items.title: 4 Takeaways From Daytona 500 Qualifying: Kyle Busch Wins His First Daytona 500 Pole
items.description: Kyle Busch won his first Daytona 500 pole with the fastest driver in qualifying. FOX Sports' Bob Pockrass breaks it down.

items.title: Michigan Rallies In the 2nd Half To Avoid Upset Loss To Northwestern
items.description: Michigan uses second-half surge to avoid upset loss to Northwestern.

items.title: Buzz Williams, Maryland Upset Iowa
items.description: Maryland upset Iowa on Wednesday night to snap the Hawkeyes’ six-game win streak.

items.title: Mick Cronin 'Really Hoping' Tom Izzo Buys Him Dinner When UCLA Visits Michigan State
items.description: Mick Cronin is looking forward to grabbing dinner with Tom Izzo when UCLA visits Michigan State next week.

items.title: England And Argentina Will Share Host City At 2026 World Cup
items.description: England have picked Kansas City as the World Cup base, sharing the city with Argentina, who also based themselves in the city.
